name: Artifice: War Tactics
short_description: Artifice: War Tactics is a turn-based roguelike where enemies show their next move. Evade, strike, and combo with your champions to flip the battlefield in your favor.
detailed_description:
Artifice: War Tactics is a turn-based strategy roguelike set in a medieval fantasy world where victory hinges on cunning tactics and skillful execution. Unlike traditional tactics games, enemies telegraph their attack zones, allowing you to anticipate and outmaneuver them. Leverage your champions' unique abilities to disrupt enemy strategies, set deadly traps, and unleash devastating combos. Survive relentless waves of foes and conquer formidable strongholds to expand your domain.​

FEATURES

  • Asymmetric Combat System: Enemies establish attack zones, challenging you to navigate the battlefield strategically and exploit their patterns.

  • Diverse Champion Roster: Unlock and command 12 unique champions, each with distinct movement patterns, abilities, and upgrade paths.

  • Strategic Chain Reactions: Combine abilities to trigger effects like piercing, burning, poisoning, and pulling enemies into traps or ally attack ranges.​

  • Dynamic Battle Objectives: Engage in varied missions such as Ambush, Escort, and Capture, each requiring different tactical approaches.

  • Environmental Hazards: Navigate through four unique biomes, each introducing hazards that can be used to your advantage or pose additional threats.

  • Epic Boss Battles: Challenge and defeat powerful bosses in their strongholds to claim new territories and rewards.

  • Loot and Progression: Pillage enemy provinces for unique loot to bolster your squad and customize your champions' abilities and stats.
